chapter_title: Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
text:
(a) This subchapter applies only to a county with a population of more than 3.3 million or a county adjacent to a county with a population of more than 3.3 million in which a municipality with a population of more than 60,000 is located.

(b) Chapter 393 (Outdoor Signs on Public Rights-of-way) does not apply to the placement of a panel or sign to which this subchapter applies.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 395. Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
##### § 395.051 — Application of Subchapter

(a) This subchapter applies only to a county with a population of more than 3.3 million or a county adjacent to a county with a population of more than 3.3 million in which a municipality with a population of more than 60,000 is located.

(b) Chapter 393 (Outdoor Signs on Public Rights-of-way) does not apply to the placement of a panel or sign to which this subchapter applies.

*Acts 2005, 79th Leg., Ch. 281 (H.B.2702), Sec. 2.80, eff. June 14, 2005.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: This subchapter applies only to a county with a population of more than 3.3 million or a county adjacent to a county with a population of more than 3.3 million in which a municipality with a population of more than 60,000 is located.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Chapter 393 (Outdoor Signs on Public Rights-of-way) does not apply to the placement of a panel or sign to which this subchapter applies.
